description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and runs a before_script to log in to registry.gitlab.com using the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define the variables TEST_IMAGE as registry.gitlab.com/keithwberry/wetty:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and RELEASE_IMAGE as registry.gitlab.com/keithwberry/wetty:latest, and set up three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that executes "docker build --pull -t $TEST_IMAGE ." then "docker push $TEST_IMAGE". In the test stage add a test job that runs "docker pull $TEST_IMAGE". In the release stage add a release job that only runs on the master branch and runs "docker pull $TEST_IMAGE", "docker tag $TEST_IMAGE $RELEASE_IMAGE", and "docker push $RELEASE_IMAGE".
